title: CVE-2026-32238 - OpenEMR has Remote Code Execution in backup functionality

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-32238 - OpenEMR has Remote Code Execution in backup
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '8.0.0.2'

level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 8.0.0.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX — CVE_2026_32238___OpenEMR_has_R"; sid:6703240; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 8.0.0.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX CVE_2026_32238___OpenEMR_has_R"; sid:9937697; rev:1;)
